title: Churhee's Riflemen

{{Quote|The riflemen are worth their high fee, and they should be kept on retainer for future needs.|Captain [[Zgorth'sth]], [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Department of Threat Assessment]]|<ref name="Galaxy at War">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref>}}
The '''Churhee's Riflemen''' were a specialized low profile [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] group located on the fringes of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

The Riflemen primarily used a modified version of the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] [[Kylan-15 blaster rifle]].

==Organization==
Churhee's Riflemen organized themselves in a similar fashion to a typical [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[scout troop]]. With about 240 members, the Riflemen divided themselves between eight [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]] of 30 men each, along with an assortment of support personnel. The platoons were further divided into ten man [[Squad/Legends|squads]] led by a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], or lances of five men led by a [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]]. Multiple groups were usually supervised by [[Sergeant major/Legends|sergeant majors]]. Riflemen training was strenuous, so much so that only about five percent of the trainees were accepted into the group and given the rank of frontiersman.

==History==
[[File:ChurheesRiflemen-GG9.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A member of Churhee's Riflemen.]]
They operated primarily within the [[Sarin sector/Legends|Sarin]] and [[Parmel sector/Legends|Parmel sectors]], but were virtually wiped out in the [[Y'Trella system/Legends|Y'Trella system]] due to a lack of support from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. This led the group, led by [[Vlaydm Churhee]]'s widow [[Maydla Churhee|Maydla]] and including [[Rathe Palror]], to work with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] instead. Its most celebrated victory while working with the Rebel Alliance was the [[Ryoone campaign|Ryoone Campaign]] when the Riflemen fought a month long engagement with the [[Lightning Squadron/Legends|Lightning Squadron]]. The headquarters of the Riflemen was on [[Turcan III]], the site of their greatest triumph. They also trained on the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Vohai]] and [[Parein II/Legends|Parein II]]. The Riflemen were also very welcoming to non-[[Human/Legends|humans]], particularly [[Lafrarian]]s and [[Ri'Dar]]s, who possessed superior distance vision.
